S28(31} ~h __,1998 . ~ ~ MINISTR\'; OF PERS.ONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES ANIJ.PI;NSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOnPICATION New Delhi, the 31 st October, 2000 G. S. R 842(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 35 and 36A of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of 'Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Mem~ bers) Rules, 19&9, namely :- • 1. (1) These rules may be called the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunql. (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chainnan, Vice-Chairman and Members) Ainendrnent Rules, 2000. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 1st day of January, 1996. 2. In rule 8 of the Andhra Administrative Tn'bunal (Salaries and AllQwances and Conditions of Service of :hairrnan, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989, in sub~rule (2), for the words "rupees one thousand four hundred .dlld fifty per annum", the words "rupees four thousand seven hundred and sixteen per annum" shall be substituted. EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM On the recommendations of the Government of Andhra Pradesh, the Central Government decided to revise the pension of Members of the Andhra Pradesh Administrative'Tnbunal with effect from the 1st day of January, 1996. Accordingly, the provisions of sub-rule (2) of rule 8 are being amended from a retrospective date that is 1st January, 1996. It is certified that no one is being affected adversely by the proposed amendment being given retrospective effect. . . [F.No. A..:1l0l412012000-ATj R K. TANDON, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :-The principal rules were notified vide number G. S. R 930(E), dated the 26th October, 1989 and subse- quently amended vide number :- (1) G.S.R 52(E), dated the 29th January, 1991. (2) G.S.R. 46(E), dated the 31st January, 1994. (3) G.S.R 660(E), dated the 21st September, 1995. (4) G.S.R. 528(E), dated the 27th August, 1998.
